data.title: Genmab’s HexaBody-CD38 Development Halted After J&J Decision
data.description:
Genmab ( (GMAB) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 10, 2025, Genmab A/S announced that Johnson & Johnson decided not to exercise its option to license HexaBody-CD38 for development and commercialization. Despite promising clinical data, Genmab will not continue its development due to market landscape evaluations and portfolio prioritization. The decision does not affect Genmab’s 2025 financial guidance, and the company remains focused on its existing pipeline, including EPKINLY and other late-stage assets.

More about Genmab

Genmab A/S is an international biotechnology company headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark, with a focus on developing innovative and differentiated antibody therapeutics. Established in 1999, the company has a proprietary pipeline that includes bispecific T-cell engagers, antibody-drug conjugates, and next-generation immune checkpoint modulators. Genmab aims to transform the lives of people with cancer and other serious diseases by 2030.

YTD Price Performance: 14.95%

Average Trading Volume: 1,328,004

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $15.32B

data.title: Terra Clean Energy Corp. Reports Promising Drilling Results at Fraser Lakes Uranium Deposit
data.description:
Tisdale Resources Corp ( (TSE:TCEC) ) has shared an announcement.

Terra Clean Energy Corp. has completed the first three drill holes at the South Falcon East Uranium Project, located near the Athabasca Basin. The project is part of an option agreement with Skyharbour Resources Ltd., allowing Terra to earn up to a 75% interest in the property. The initial drilling results are promising, showing mineralization and potential expansion of the Fraser Lakes B Uranium Deposit. The company plans to focus on defining a new area of interest, aiming to discover a high-grade unconformity uranium deposit.

More about Tisdale Resources Corp

data.title: Pampa Energía Proposes Key Financial Decisions Ahead of Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
The latest update is out from Pampa Energia SA ( (PAM) ).

Pampa Energía S.A. held a Board meeting on March 10, 2025, to discuss proposals for the upcoming General Ordinary and Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for April 7, 2025. The Board proposed the approval of the company’s financial statements for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024, which showed a profit of Ps. 564,587 million. The Board recommended allocating the retained earnings of Ps. 766,073 million to a voluntary reserve, with no dividends expected to be declared. The funds will be used for business expansion, investment opportunities, and safeguarding shareholder interests amid market volatility. Additionally, the Board proposed the approval of director and supervisory committee fees for the fiscal year 2024, emphasizing alignment with market standards and company performance.

More about Pampa Energia SA

Pampa Energía S.A. is an Argentine company operating in the energy sector, primarily involved in the exploration and production of oil and gas, with a focus on projects in Vaca Muerta, particularly in Rincón de Aranda. The company is also engaged in generating and distributing electricity, positioning itself as a key player in Argentina’s energy market.

data.title: CNL Healthcare Properties Announces Increased NAV Amid Challenges
data.description:
CNL Healthcare Properties ( (CHTH) ) has provided an update.

On March 5, 2025, CNL Healthcare Properties announced an estimated net asset value (NAV) of $6.64 per share as of December 31, 2024, reflecting a 5.73% increase from the previous year. This increase was driven by improved property performance and increased appraised values, despite economic challenges such as inflation and rising interest rates. The valuation was conducted by an independent firm and approved by the company’s board, highlighting the company’s resilience and strategic focus in the seniors housing industry.

More about CNL Healthcare Properties

CNL Healthcare Properties, Inc. operates in the real estate investment industry, focusing primarily on seniors housing communities and healthcare real estate. The company manages a portfolio that includes 69 seniors housing properties and one parcel of land, aiming to provide value through strategic real estate investments and management.

data.title: Bank of Marin Bancorp to Attend Piper Sandler Forum
data.description:
Bank Of Marin Bancorp ( (BMRC) ) has provided an update.

Bank of Marin Bancorp announced that its President and CEO, Tim Myers, and CFO, David Bonaccorso, will participate in the Piper Sandler Western Bank Forum on March 10-11, 2025. The bank reported strong financial performance in the fourth quarter of 2024, with a 36% increase in EPS and a 9.65% decline in the efficiency ratio. Despite a decrease in total deposits, the bank maintained a strong capital position and improved credit quality metrics. The strategic focus remains on building long-term shareholder value through disciplined business practices and community commitment.

More about Bank Of Marin Bancorp

Bank of Marin Bancorp, headquartered in Novato, CA, operates as the parent company of Bank of Marin. It is a community-focused financial institution with a strong emphasis on relationship banking, offering high-quality banking products and services. The bank is committed to community engagement and operates 27 branch locations and 8 commercial banking offices. As of December 31, 2024, it had a market cap of $382.4 million and total assets of $3.7 billion.
